info.title: Acumatica Payment Simulation API
info.description:
Simulates Acumatica's Accounts Receivable payment entry workflow. Includes an AI agent (Claude) for extracting payment data from PDF remittance documents. Designed to be consumed by Microsoft Copilot Studio as a custom OpenAPI connector.

## Workflow
1. **Extract** — POST a remittance PDF to `/extract` → get structured payment fields
2. **Validate** — GET `/invoices/{ref}` to confirm invoices are Open
3. **Create** — POST to `/payments` with customer, amount, method, and invoice references
4. **Release** — POST to `/payments/{id}/release` to finalize

## Conversational shortcut
POST to `/agent` with a message and a base64 PDF to let the AI handle all four steps.

## Authentication
Set `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` in your environment. Production deployments should add Azure API Management or OAuth2 in front of this service.

get.description: Search Acumatica customers by name fragment. Case-insensitive partial match.
Retrieve a single customer record by their Acumatica Customer ID.
Search Acumatica invoices. Mirrors the **Invoices and Memos** screen in the Receivables module. Use `customer_id` and/or `status` to filter results. Returns all open invoices by default.

parameters.name: customer_id

schema.description: Filter by Acumatica Customer ID (e.g. OXBLUE001)
schema.title: Customer Id

parameters.description: Filter by Acumatica Customer ID (e.g. OXBLUE001)

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by invoice status. Defaults to all statuses.
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by invoice status. Defaults to all statuses.

get.description: Retrieve a single invoice by its reference number. Returns invoice details including current balance due and status. Use this before creating a payment to verify the invoice exists and is Open.
List all payment records. Filter by customer or status. Results are sorted newest-first.

post.description:
Create a new payment record and apply it to one or more invoices. This simulates both **Method 1** (Pay From an Invoice) and **Method 2** (New Payment from Receivables menu) from the Acumatica SOP. 

**Validation rules applied:**
- Customer must exist
- All invoices must exist, belong to the customer, and be Open
- Payment amount must match the sum of amounts_to_apply
- Duplicate payment_ref check prevents double-entry

Payment is created in **Open** status. Call `POST /payments/{id}/release` to finalize.

get.description: Retrieve a single payment record by its internal payment ID.

post.description:
Release a payment record. This is the equivalent of clicking the green **RELEASE** button in Acumatica. Once released:
- Status changes from **Open** → **Released**
- The transaction is posted to the general ledger
- The applied invoices are marked Closed if fully paid

Only payments in **Open** status can be released.

400.description: Payment is not in a releasable state

post.summary: Extract payment data from a PDF remittance
post.description:
Upload a PDF remittance advice document. The AI (Claude claude-sonnet-4-20250514) will parse it and return structured payment fields including invoice numbers, amounts, date, customer name, and payment reference.

If `needs_review` is **False** and confidence ≥ 0.75, the response also includes a `suggested_payload` ready to POST directly to `POST /payments`.

Supports remittances with single or multiple invoices.

A full conversational AI agent for processing remittance payments. Send a natural language message and an optional base64-encoded PDF. The agent will:
1. Parse the PDF and extract payment fields
2. Validate invoices against Acumatica
3. Create the payment record
4. Optionally release the payment if `auto_release=true`

Supports multi-turn conversations via `conversation_id` and `history`.

**Designed for Microsoft Copilot Studio** — returns structured `payment_created` and `extracted_data` fields alongside a plain-English `message`.

get.description: Returns service status. Use this as the Copilot Studio connector health probe.

content.title: Content
content.example: Process the attached remittance for invoice 607535

message.title: Message
message.description: Natural language instruction from the user
message.example: Process this remittance and enter the payment in Acumatica

conversation_id.title: Conversation Id
conversation_id.description: Session ID to maintain multi-turn context

auto_release.title: Auto Release
auto_release.description: If True, release the payment immediately after creation. Default False requires explicit release.

history.title: History
history.description: Prior conversation turns for multi-turn context

AgentRequest.title: AgentRequest
AgentRequest.description:
Conversational agent request. Accepts a message and an optional base64-encoded PDF.
The agent will extract payment data, validate against Acumatica, and execute if approved.

extracted_data.description: Payment data extracted from the PDF (if any)

payment_created.description: Payment record created in Acumatica (if action was taken)

payment_released.title: Payment Released
payment_released.description: True if the payment was also released

action_taken.title: Action Taken
action_taken.description: Summary of what the agent did: 'extracted_only' | 'created_payment' | 'created_and_released' | 'needs_review' | 'error'

next_steps.title: Next Steps
next_steps.description: Suggested follow-up actions for the user

remaining_balance.title: Remaining Balance
remaining_balance.description: Invoice balance remaining after this payment

email_subject.title: Email Subject
email_subject.description: Email subject line (helps with date and customer detection)

email_body.title: Email Body
email_body.description: Email body text (used as fallback if PDF is sparse)

payment_amount.title: Payment Amount
payment_amount.description: Total payment amount in USD. For multiple invoices enter the combined total.

payment_method.description: Payment method — must match the Cash Account selected

application_date.title: Application Date
application_date.description: Date the payment was received. If not on remittance, use the email date.

payment_ref.title: Payment Ref
payment_ref.description: Payment reference from client remittance. Use invoice number if client reference cannot be copy-pasted.

invoices_to_apply.title: Invoices To Apply
invoices_to_apply.description: One or more invoices this payment should be applied to

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Optional internal notes about this payment

CreatePaymentRequest.title: CreatePaymentRequest
CreatePaymentRequest.description:
Request body to create a new payment record in Acumatica.
Mirrors the fields filled on the Payment screen (Method 1 or Method 2).

example.notes: Single invoice payment from emailed PDF

customer_name.title: Customer Name
customer_name.description: Full legal name of the customer

field.title: Field
field.description: Specific field that caused the error, if applicable

customer_name.title: Customer Name
customer_name.description: Customer name found in the document

payment_date.title: Payment Date
payment_date.description: Payment date as found in document (ISO 8601 preferred)

payment_method.title: Payment Method
payment_method.description: Payment method detected (ACH, Wire, Check, etc.)

payment_reference.title: Payment Reference
payment_reference.description: Client payment reference or check number

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.description: AI confidence score 0.0–1.0. Below 0.75 triggers human review.

needs_review.title: Needs Review
needs_review.description: True when confidence < 0.75 or required fields are missing

raw_text_excerpt.title: Raw Text Excerpt
raw_text_excerpt.description: Short excerpt from the document used for extraction

extraction_notes.title: Extraction Notes
extraction_notes.description: Any caveats or ambiguities the AI flagged during extraction

ExtractedPaymentData.title: ExtractedPaymentData
ExtractedPaymentData.description:
Structured payment data extracted from a remittance PDF or email by the AI agent.
Confidence scores help the caller decide whether to auto-apply or request human review.

extraction_id.title: Extraction Id
extraction_id.description: Unique ID for this extraction job

extracted_data.description: The structured data extracted from the document

suggested_payload.description: A pre-filled CreatePaymentRequest ready to POST to /payments if needs_review is False

customer_id.title: Customer Id
customer_id.description: Customer ID linked to this invoice

amount_to_apply.title: Amount To Apply
amount_to_apply.description: Dollar amount to apply from this payment to this invoice

InvoiceApplication.title: InvoiceApplication
InvoiceApplication.description: A single invoice to apply against a payment.

applied_invoices.title: Applied Invoices
applied_invoices.description: Invoices this payment has been applied to

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when payment record was created

released_at.title: Released At
released_at.description: Timestamp when payment was released (None if not yet released)

status.description: New status after release — should be 'Released'

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Read-only access to Acumatica invoice records. Mirrors the **Receivables → Invoices and Memos** screen.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Create, list, retrieve, and release payment records. Mirrors both **Method 1** (Pay from Invoice) and **Method 2** (New Payment from Receivables menu) workflows.

tags.name: AI Agent
tags.description: AI-powered endpoints using Claude claude-sonnet-4-20250514. `/extract` parses a PDF remittance into structured fields. `/agent` is a conversational interface that handles the full extract → validate → create → release pipeline.
